title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.813 - Samuel C Houston Memorial Highway designated in Clay County
text:
227.813.  Samuel C Houston Memorial Highway designated in Clay County. — The portion of State Highway 291 from N.E. Cookingham Drive continuing south to Kansas Street in Clay County shall be designated the "Samuel C Houston Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
